creator: Axel.Thimm@physik.fu-berlin.de
text:
Cfengine is a tool for setting up and maintaining BSD and
	System-5-like operating systems optionally attached to a TCP/IP
	network.

	This is my first port, please be gentle :)

	-- Axel

Fix: 

Uploaded to
	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/cfengine-1.4.10.tag.gz
